# BrandKraf — Digital Marketing Agency in Malaysia

> BrandKraf is a Kuala Lumpur-based digital marketing agency that helps Malaysian businesses grow with user-generated content (UGC), TikTok marketing, Meta and Google ads, social media management, KOC/influencer campaigns, and AI-driven automation.

BrandKraf is an SSM-registered, full-service agency based in Cheras, Kuala Lumpur, serving SMEs and brands across Malaysia and Southeast Asia — with strategy, content, advertising, and automation under one roof. Contact: admin@brandkraf.com, +60 3-9134 3603.

## Services
- [Social Media Management](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/social-media-management): Full-service social media content, posting, and growth across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and more.
- [Paid Advertising](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/paid-advertising): Profitable Meta, Google, and marketplace (Shopee/Lazada) ad campaigns managed end-to-end.
- [UGC Content Creation](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/ugc-content-creation): Authentic, ad-ready user-generated content across every industry.
- [TikTok Live Selling](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/tiktok-live-service): TikTok live commerce and selling for Malaysian brands.
- [KOC / Influencer Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/koc-kol-service): KOC and influencer campaigns that drive measurable sales, not vanity reach.
- [AI-Driven Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/ai-driven-marketing): AI-powered marketing strategy, content, and automation.
- [Branding & Creative](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/branding-creative): Brand identity, design, and creative direction.
- [Website Development](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/website-development): Fast, conversion-focused websites.
- [Chatbot Development](https://www.brandkraf.com/portfolio/chatbot-development): WhatsApp and web chatbots that qualify leads and answer customers 24/7.

## Free tools
- [Free Marketing Tools](https://www.brandkraf.com/tools): Hub of free, no-sign-up marketing calculators.
- [Marketing Cost Calculator](https://www.brandkraf.com/marketing-cost-calculator): Estimate digital marketing costs in Malaysia by service.
- [ROAS Calculator](https://www.brandkraf.com/roas-calculator): Calculate return on ad spend, ROI, and profit.
- [Engagement Rate Calculator](https://www.brandkraf.com/engagement-rate-calculator): Measure social engagement rate vs industry benchmarks.
- [Ad Budget Calculator](https://www.brandkraf.com/ad-budget-calculator): Work backwards from a sales goal to the ad budget you need.

- [Digital Marketing Guides](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides): Hub of in-depth guides organized by topic.
- [TikTok Marketing in Malaysia](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/tiktok-marketing): Win the platform Malaysians can’t stop scrolling.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/social-media-marketing): Turn followers into customers, not just likes.
- [UGC & Influencer Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/ugc-influencer-marketing): Authentic content that sells harder than ads.
- [Paid Advertising](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/paid-advertising): Make every ringgit of ad spend work harder.
- [SEO & Local Marketing](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/seo): Be the brand customers find first.
- [AI Marketing & Automation](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/ai-marketing): Do more with a smaller team.
- [Digital Marketing Basics & Growth](https://www.brandkraf.com/guides/digital-marketing-basics): The foundations every Malaysian business needs.

## Locations
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Kuala Lumpur](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/kuala-lumpur): Digital marketing services for businesses in Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Petaling Jaya](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/petaling-jaya): Digital marketing services for businesses in Petaling Jaya, Selangor.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Shah Alam](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/shah-alam): Digital marketing services for businesses in Shah Alam, Selangor.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Subang Jaya](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/subang-jaya): Digital marketing services for businesses in Subang Jaya, Selangor.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Johor Bahru](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/johor-bahru): Digital marketing services for businesses in Johor Bahru, Johor.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Penang](https://www.brandkraf.com/digital-marketing-agency/penang): Digital marketing services for businesses in Penang, Penang.
